settings.heading: Manuals framework
settings.copy: Designed for setup guides, quick-start documents, and future product-linked support documentation.

settings.heading: Manuals and setup guidance by product family
settings.copy: This section can later be powered by metaobjects that connect manuals to products, collections, and lifecycle stages.
settings.source_note: Manual entries can later map to structured documents tied to products, families, or support lifecycle stages.

settings.title: Quick-start guide entry
settings.copy: Reserved for setup documentation and essential first-use steps.

settings.title: Full manual entry
settings.copy: Reserved for complete product documentation and deeper usage guidance.

settings.title: Installation or workflow note
settings.copy: Reserved for product-specific setup notes or advanced usage instructions.

settings.heading: Manuals can connect directly into compatibility and troubleshooting
settings.copy: This space supports escalation into compatibility guidance, FAQ content, or direct support contact.
